info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API specification for the Ecommerce-buildTime platform, enabling access to product, order, and customer management functionalities.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including creation, updating, and retrieval.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints to create, update, and track customer orders.

tags.name: customers
tags.description: Manage customer information and account settings.

post.description: This operation registers a new user by accepting the user details in the request body. On success, it returns the registered user's information.

requestBody.description: User registration request data including required user details.

example.message: Provided user information is invalid or incomplete.

409.description: User with provided details already exists.

example.message: A user with this email or username already exists.

500.description: Internal server error while registering user.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for the specified user
post.description: Allows placing a new order for a user identified by userId. The request must contain all necessary order details. Returns the placed order information on success.

400.description: Invalid order details or user ID provided.

example.message: Order request contains invalid or missing data.

details.issue: Order items list is empty or invalid

404.description: User not found for the provided userId.

example.message: No user found with the specified userId.

500.description: Internal server error while placing order.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order by ID
get.description: Fetches order details for the given orderId. Returns detailed information about the order including status, items, and totals.

example.message: The orderId parameter is malformed or invalid.

404.description: Order not found for the provided orderId.

example.message: No order found with the specified orderId.

500.description: Internal server error retrieving order details.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's cart
post.description: Adds a new item specified in the request body to the cart of the user identified by userId. Returns updated cart details on success.

requestBody.description: Details of the cart item to add, including product ID and quantity.

400.description: Invalid cart item data or userId.

example.message: Cart item data is incomplete or invalid.

details.issue: Quantity must be greater than zero

500.description: Internal server error while adding item to cart.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve the current cart contents for a user
get.description: Fetches and returns the current shopping cart details for the user identified by userId.

example.message: The provided userId format is invalid.

500.description: Internal server error fetching cart data.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track the shipping status of an order
get.description: Retrieve the current tracking information for the specified order using its unique order identifier. Returns detailed status and location updates for the shipment.

200.description: Successful tracking response with current shipment details

example.message: No tracking information found for order ID ord-7b3d8f2a

details.issue: Order ID does not exist or has no tracking data

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving tracking information

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Create a new product in the product catalog by specifying all required product details in the request body.

example.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
example.description: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation and 20 hours battery life

200.description: Product successfully added to the catalog

example.message: The provided product information is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the given identifier or name already exists.

500.description: Internal server error while adding product

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Endpoint for receiving real-time payment updates from external payment providers. Processes payment event data sent in the request body.

requestBody.description: Payment event data sent by the payment provider

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields.
The payment processing failed or was declined.

500.description: Internal server error during webhook processing

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Start a payment process for an order or service by submitting required payment details in the request body. Returns payment processing status and transaction details.

requestBody.description: Details required to initiate the payment

example.message: Payment request contains invalid or missing fields.

details.issue: Card number is required and must be valid

example.message: Payment was declined or authorization failed.

details.issue: Payment method was rejected by provider

500.description: Internal server error during payment initiation

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway

totalAmount.description: Total amount for the order before discounts

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order

currency.description: Currency code for the order amounts

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order

items.description: List of items included in the order

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order

status.description: Current processing status of the order

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created

active.description: Indicates if the user account is currently active

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user data was last updated

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Number of items currently in stock

quantity.description: Number of units ordered for the product

price.description: Original price per unit of the product

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount

quantity.description: Number of units added to the cart

productId.description: Unique identifier for the product in the cart

price.description: Original price per unit of the product

discount.description: Discount amount applied per unit in the cart

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount in the cart

currency.description: Currency code of the prices used

productName.description: Name of the product in the cart

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the tracking information was last updated

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier company handling delivery

estimatedDelivery.description: Expected delivery date in ISO 8601 format

trackingId.description: Tracking identifier provided by the courier

totalAmount.description: Sum of all product prices before discounts

totalDiscount.description: Total amount of discounts applied to the cart

currency.description: Currency code used for all prices

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user who owns the cart

items.description: List of items currently present in the cart

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after all discounts

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated

amount.description: The total amount to be paid

paymentMethod.description: Method used for payment, e.g. credit card, PayPal

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway used to process the payment

preferredCurrency.description: Currency preferred by the user for transactions

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

userType.description: Type/category of the user, e.g. admin, customer

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used for the transaction

currency.description: Currency code used in the transaction

transactionId.description: External transaction identifier from the payment gateway

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Number of items currently in stock

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product details were last updated

error.description: Short description of the error type

status.description: HTTP status code of the error response

path.description: Request path that triggered the error

errorCode.description: Code identifying the specific error condition

details.description: List of specific issues in the request causing the error

field.description: Field name related to the issue

issue.description: Description of the issue with the field

error.description: Short description of the error type

status.description: HTTP status code of the error response
